summary:
The pes anserinus features unique convergent tendon inserts from three muscles onto the tibia, a specific tendinous architecture not mirrored in the TMJ, parotid gland, submandublar gland, or cheek. Therefore, no comparable structure exists among the given options.  

$\boxed{\text{E}}$
